macrostructure: 12 standalone demo pages (poster one-pager, manifesto-poster, letter, menu-board, gallery index, evening-menu, law-library tenets, drawing-set index, 4x booking splits)
theme: 12 custom per-trade palettes + type pairings (copper/Big Shoulders, ember/Alfa Slab, green/Fraunces, kraft/Yeseva, IKB/Marcellus, amber/Prata, gilt/Cinzel, ochre/Schibsted, plum/Bodoni, amber/Chakra Petch, red-pen/Baloo, lilac/Bricolage)

brief: Local Web SA · portfolio-grade redesign of the 12 demo templates as standalone pages, modal loads them in iframes
